title: mandirola multiflora var. gardneriana
intro: Mandirola multiflora var. gardneriana, also known as the Strychnos nux-vomica, is a plant species that belongs to the Loganiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a potential source of antiviral and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Mandirola multiflora var. gardneriana include its traditional use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often used to make a medicinal extract, which can be administered as a tincture or added to teas and other medicinal concoctions.
